name: Upstage
description: Registers Upstage Solar as a first-party OpenAI-compatible chat provider using UPSTAGE_API_KEY or a Plugin Setting.

env.description: Fallback Upstage API key used for Solar inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Upstage API key
settings.description: Upstage API key used for Solar inference. Falls back to UPSTAGE_API_KEY.

providers.name: Upstage Solar
providers.description: Runs Upstage Solar chat models through Pi's OpenAI-compatible completions transport.
